base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of text_font_health_bars — a ui (hud_readout) from 1991 street fighter ii. Game text + font glyphs + top health-bars + timer. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Game text + font glyphs + top health-bars + timer
